subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 706068974/230518095 is not a GRB
body:
J. Wood (NASA/MSFC) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 706068974/230518095 at 02:16:09.41 UT
on 18 May 2023, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
